pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to target Java 11 instead of Java 8.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project will not compile or run with Java 11 features if the source/target compatibility remains set to 1.8.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add explicit dependency for jakarta.annotation-api to replace the removed javax.annotation module from the JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Code using javax.annotation annotations (e.g., @PostConstruct, @PreDestroy) will fail to compile because the module was removed in Java 11.
